pages.raw_text:
BOISE, May 8.-Judge Fremont
Wood today denied the motion of
counsel for Haywood. accused of
completely in the murder of for
mer Governor Steunenberg, for a
bill Of particulars setting forth in
detail what the prosecution expects
to prove.


The court held that such applica-
ton should have been made before
the trial date was set or the defen-
dant made plea of not guilty.


The defense took exception,
which the court ordered recorded.
Trial will proceed Thursday with
the selection of the jury.


An indication of how people re-
gard the trial was given by bust
ness men this morning who were
drawn on to panel asking to be ex-
cused "to participate in a shoot of
the gun club" The judge didn't
like, it but finally excused them, at
torneys agreeing.
